title: workspaces — permissions
description: Permission strings this module publishes. Split by guard: platform_admin (Academorix staff surface) vs sanctum (workspace users self-serving their own workspace). Seeded by `WorkspacesPermissionSeeder` with `is_system=true` on `firstOrCreate` (idempotent).

permissions.name: manage_workspaces
permissions.description: Full CRUD over every workspace on the platform. Required for the platform-admin workspace catalogue surface. Also gates suspend / resume / archive lifecycle actions and impersonation.

permissions.name: view_workspaces
permissions.description: Read-only access to the platform-admin workspace list + detail. Handed to ops-tier staff who need to answer support tickets without mutating workspace state.

permissions.name: manage_applications
permissions.description: Full CRUD over the Application catalogue. Applications rarely change — this permission is scoped to a very small platform-engineering group.

permissions.name: manage_business_types
permissions.description: Create / edit the BusinessType catalogue. Read is public.

permissions.name: manage_identities
permissions.description: Read the Identity list + issue right-to-erasure. Required for GDPR Art. 17 fulfilment. Handed to the DPO + super admin only.

permissions.name: workspaces.manage_own_settings
permissions.description: Edit the caller's own workspace via PATCH /api/current-workspace. Name, business_type, provisioning bag, default branding fields.

permissions.name: workspaces.manage_domains
permissions.description: CRUD over the caller's own Domain rows + verify.

permissions.name: workspaces.manage_branding
permissions.description: CRUD over Branding profiles + promote (set primary).

permissions.name: workspaces.manage_integrations
permissions.description: CRUD over WorkspaceIntegration rows. Sensitive — restricted to owner + admin. v2.
